name: On the Rainbow Dragon
description:
You are standing on the Rainbow Dragon, surrounded by many beams of coloured
light.  Through the bottom of the Rainbow Dragon you see the City of Atlantis a
land surrounding it.  It seems to be miles below you.

exits.description: The Rainbow Dragon extends far above you, slowly fading into darkness.
The Rainbow Dragon extends below you towards the land you once knew as home.

extra_descriptions.description:
The Rainbow Dragon softly glows with beams of light, in colours that
defie description.
